analysis: Built on the robust model selection pipeline established in the previous iteration by re-introducing data augmentation during the BraTS fine-tuning phase. Using random spatial flips during training, combined with the one-time deterministic geometric pre-training on 20,000 shapes, successfully regularized the optimization of the classification head. The model selection over 10 random starts identified a new peak validation AUC of 0.6051. This validates that data augmentation functions synergistically with the embedded geometric priors, provided the best optimizing initialization path is chosen.
